presets.name: lossless-repack
presets.description: Bit-exact PLY repack with no SH compression. Lossless. Use as a fidelity baseline or to convert PLY to gltf/glb without quality changes.

presets.name: web-mobile
presets.description: Mobile-web sweet-spot preset. SH degree 1, 8-bit attribute quant, mobile-friendly SPZ output. Geometric mean ~22x compression on SplatBench.

presets.name: web-desktop
presets.description: Desktop-web preset. SH degree 2, 10-bit attribute quant. Higher fidelity than web-mobile, larger files. ~12x compression.

presets.name: quest-browser
presets.description: Meta Quest browser preset. Optimized for the Quest 3 browser GPU budget. SH degree 1, aggressive floater prune.

presets.name: visionos-preview
presets.description: Apple visionOS preview preset. Targets Reality Composer Pro-compatible USDZ-style glb. SH degree 2, color-managed.

presets.name: thumbnail-preview
presets.description: Tiny preview tier for catalogue thumbnails. SH degree 0 (diffuse only), aggressive splat decimation. ~50x compression.

presets.name: quality-max
presets.description: Highest free-tier quality. SH degree 3, 12-bit quant, no decimation. ~6x compression but near-lossless visually.

presets.name: size-min
presets.description: Smallest free-tier output. Aggressive prune + decimation + SH trim. ~32x compression with visible quality drop.

presets.name: differentiable-repack
presets.description: gsplat self-distillation pass that fine-tunes attributes to recover fidelity lost to quantization. ~3-5 dB PSNR improvement over web-mobile at the same byte budget. Runs on A100.

presets.name: v52-quality
presets.description: V5.2 SOTA quality tier. T2.1.R + joint-tail residual. +15.56 dB over SOG at ~1.02x SOG bytes on canonical-11. Best fidelity-per-byte on the market.

presets.name: v52-balanced
presets.description: V5.2 balanced tier. Pareto sweet-spot — ~10 dB over SOG at ~0.85x SOG bytes. Default paid recommendation.

presets.name: t21r-fast
presets.description: T2.1.R fast preset. Anchor-only (no V5.2 tail). +13.10 dB over SOG at ~1.02x SOG bytes; fastest paid preset (no tail-residual encode).
